Scenarios.title: Study ABC-2024 results ingestion
Scenarios.description: Ingest study portal results: de-duplicate documents, normalize PDFs and ELN records, extract entities, and link documents to datasets and protocols before Vector DB persistence.

study.title: Phase II efficacy study ABC-2024
study.primaryEndpoint: Change from baseline in HbA1c at Week 24

Scenarios.title: Study XYZ-2023 biomarker data ingestion
Scenarios.description: Ingest biomarker assay results from LIMS and imaging archives: harmonize assay panels, link specimens to visit windows, and validate metadata before Vector DB persistence.

Scenarios.title: Compound safety profile lookup
Scenarios.description: Query accumulated Vector DB knowledge for adverse event patterns and dose-limiting toxicities reported across early-phase studies for CMP-8821.
Scenarios.sampleQuestion: What adverse events were reported for CMP-8821 in Phase I studies?

Scenarios.title: Cross-study endpoint lineage query
Scenarios.description: Query accumulated Vector DB knowledge to find protocols sharing the same primary endpoint as ABC-2024, with grounded citations and EU regional policy compliance review.
Scenarios.sampleQuestion: Which protocols share the same primary endpoint as ABC-2024?

study.title: Phase II efficacy study ABC-2024
study.primaryEndpoint: Change from baseline in HbA1c at Week 24
